title: Array Push/Pop
description: Add and remove items from a Ruby array using the push and pop methods.
problemStatement:
Manipulation! Start with an empty array `arr = []`. Push the number `7` into it. Then, call `pop` on it and print the result of the pop operation.

**Requirement:** Use the `.push` and `.pop` methods.
hints: `pop` removes the last element and returns it, effectively 'taking it out' of the array.
